title: Taco Bell temporarily offering Beyond Meat carne asada at select Ohio locations
text: Taco Bell will temporarily offer Beyond Meat carne asada at select locations in Dayton, Ohio, starting Oct. 13, Taco Bell and Beyond Meat have announced.

title: Taco Bell is debuting meatless carne asada to select locations as part of its much anticipated partnership with Beyond Meat
text: The new option will be available as part of a quesadilla, but customers can also choose to substitute it for any protein on the menu at the same cost.

title: Taco Bell to test long-awaited Beyond Meat carne asada in Ohio next month
text: Taco Bell will test meatless carne asada made with Beyond Meat at dozens of its restaurants in Dayton, Ohio.

title: Taco Bell Is Launching A Plant-Based Carne Asada Test With Beyond Meat
text: Taco Bell and Beyond Meat today announced they will test a new Beyond Carne Asada Steak offering in the Dayton, Ohio, market beginning Oct. 13 for a limited time.

title: THE COLLAB YOU'VE BEEN CRAVING: TACO BELL® INTRODUCES NEW BEYOND CARNE ASADA STEAK™
text: In partnership with Beyond Meat®, Taco Bell is offering the first-of-its kind innovation at price parity to traditional steak for a limited time in Dayton, Ohio area as the brand increases accessibility to delicious plant-based items IRVINE, Calif. , Sept. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Taco Bell and Beyond Meat® today announce the unveiling of a first-of-its kind, category-disrupting product: Beyond Carne Asada Steak™.

title: Pizza Hut parent Yum Brands board approves new up to $2 billion share buyback
text: Yum Brands Inc. YUM, -0.23% said Monday its board has approved a share buyback program of up to $2 billion to be valid through June 30 of 2024. The operator of KFC, Taco Bell and Pizza Hut restaurants, said the authorization will take effect once its current program has been exhausted.
